name: dev.splatfacadebaker.unity-importer
description: Editor-only Unity importer for SFB 2.5D mobile packages: .sfb.json, .sfbmesh.json, textures, LODs, collider proxies and .sfbscene.json scene graphs.

samples.description: A tiny sample package layout and importer notes.
A minimal .sfbscene.json graph made of two DemoWall cards.
